notes: UX fixes: PROXYIP 'Verify' now explains it needs no separate test (was looking dead); Proxy 'Save' reminds you to re-fetch the subscription + reconnect; WireGuard 'Load from WARP' tells you to Register first; WARP 'Register' now auto-falls-back to the central pool if direct registration is blocked (helps Iran). No worker logic change from 3.3.0.
